entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 7 PM CDT TUESDAY

entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS AROUND 90
CALM WINDS, BECOMING NORTH AROUND 5 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
HIGHS AROUND 90
